case.title: BOARD OF LICENSE COMMISSIONERS OF TOWN OF TIVERTON v. PASTORE

opinion.h1: BOARD OF LICENSE COMMISSIONERS OF TOWN OF TIVERTON v. PASTORE, 468 U.S. 1216 (1984)
opinion.p: BOARD OF LICENSE COMMISSIONERS OF the TOWN OF TIVERTON, petitioner, v. Louis H. PASTORE, Jr., etc., et al. No. 83-963.
Supreme Court of the United States
Petition for writ of certiorari to the Supreme Court of Rhode Island.
Granted.[ Board of License Commissioners of Town of Tiverton v. Pastore 468 U.S. 1216 (1984) ]
